expectations.text: Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory
expectations.evidence: No complexity advisory or split suggestion. The review is a concise single-issue report.

expectations.text: Review does not flag breaking changes
expectations.evidence: No breaking changes are mentioned. The review focuses solely on the missing #createViewContext call bug.

The review identifies a bug (missing root tab view context) that would prevent the feature from working correctly. While there's no explicit 'Request Changes' label, the content clearly describes a must-fix issue. However, there's no explicit verdict statement.
Review is 10 lines, well under the 200 line limit.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues (formatting, whitespace, naming conventions, comment grammar, code style preferences) unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: The single finding is a functional bug (missing view context creation). No stylistic issues flagged.
